titleStmt.title: The Acting Secretary of State to the Legation in Saudi Arabia

head.hi: The Acting Secretary of State to the Legation in Saudi Arabia

div.p: Plan is for US followed by UK to propose this to SAG and UK submit it to protected Sheikdoms at same time. Two weeks later US and Brit Ambs will make parallel approaches Govts of Iraq and Iran. Separate instructions full details to follow.

Hold matter in strictest secrecy and take no action re proclamation except consultation with your Brit colleague pending receipt specific instructions for carrying out above-mentioned plan.This telegram was repeated to Baghdad, Cairo, London, and Tehran.
